popularStory.description:
The Life Summary of Roger V

When Roger V de Pilkington was born on 21 September 1323, in Chelsworth, Suffolk, England, his father, Sir Roger Pilkington, IV, was 32 and his mother, Alice de Bury, was …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger de Pilkington III於1325年出生在英國藍卡爾皮爾金頓時，他的父親Sir Roger de Pilkington II34歲，母親Alicia de Bury24歲。他於大約1353年與Alicia De Bury or Mrs Roger Pilkington在英國英格蘭藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1407年1月2日在他的家鄉享年82歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger de Pilkington III于1325年出生在英国藍卡爾皮爾金頓时，他的父亲Sir Roger de Pilkington II34岁，母亲Alicia de Bury24岁。他于大约1353年与Alicia De Bury or Mrs Roger Pilkington在英国英格兰藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1407年1月2日在他的家乡享年82岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Pilkington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northwestern): habitational name from a place in Lancashire. The placename may derive from an Old English personal name Pīleca or Pīloc + patronymic -ing + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The surname is established in Ireland, where its presence was first recorded in the early 15th century.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger de Pilkington III was born in 1325, in Pilkington, Lancashire, England, his father, Sir Roger de Pilkington II, was 34 and his mother, Alicia de Bury, was 24. He married Alicia De Bury or Mrs Roger Pilkington about 1353, in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died on 2 January 1407, in his hometown, at the age of 82.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger de Pilkington III est né en 1325, à Pilkington, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Roger de Pilkington II, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Alicia de Bury, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Alicia De Bury or Mrs Roger Pilkington environ 1353, à Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé le 2 janvier 1407, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 82 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger de Pilkington III 1325 in Pilkington, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Roger de Pilkington II 34 und seine Mutter Alicia de Bury 24. Er hat um 1353 in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Alicia De Bury or Mrs Roger Pilkington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb am 2. Januar 1407 im Alter von 82 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Pilkington III è nato il nel 1325 nel Pilkington, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Sir Roger de Pilkington II, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Alicia de Bury, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Alicia De Bury or Mrs Roger Pilkington circa 1353, nel Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 2 gennaio 1407, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 82 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger de Pilkington IIIが1325年にイギリスランカシュアイアピルキントンで生まれた時，父Sir Roger de Pilkington IIは34歳，母Alicia de Buryは24歳であった。約1353年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアでAlicia De Bury or Mrs Roger Pilkingtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1407年1月2日に故郷で82歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger de Pilkington III(이)가 1325년 영국 랭카실르 피킨그턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Roger de Pilkington II(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Alicia de Bury(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1353년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르에서 Alicia De Bury or Mrs Roger Pilkington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1407년 1월 2일 그의 고향에서 82세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Pilkington III nasceu em 1325, em Pilkington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Roger de Pilkington II, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Alicia de Bury, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Alicia De Bury or Mrs Roger Pilkington aproximadamente 1353, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 2 de janeiro de 1407, em sua cidade natal, com 82 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger de Pilkington III родился в 1325 г. в местности пилкингтон, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Roger de Pilkington II было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Alicia de Bury, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Alicia De Bury or Mrs Roger Pilkington около 1353 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер 2 января 1407 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 82 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger de Pilkington III nació en 1325, en Pilkington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Roger de Pilkington II, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Alicia de Bury, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Alicia De Bury or Mrs Roger Pilkington aproximadamente 1353, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 2 de enero de 1407, en su pueblo, a la edad de 82 años.
